summary: CRITICAL: Missing label-assigner.test.ts (required for TDD, breaks entire test pipeline). Actions not pinned to commit SHAs—uses actions/checkout@v4 instead of full SHA (violates explicit GITHUB ACTIONS REQUIREMENT). Workflow lacks actionlint validation step (requirement: 'Run actionlint...fix any errors'). Missing package.json, bun.lock, .actrc referenced in run-act-tests.ts lines 35-40. Hard-coded test expectations (run-act-tests.ts:81-92) are fragile. Test harness structure unclear: run-act-tests.ts references itself as a file to copy, then runs from within workflow context (architecture confused). Core assignLabels() logic is sound, but deliverable incomplete and non-functional as-is.
